use_cases: Interactive button with 3D visual depth for calls-to-action
Decorative SVG splash elements create eye-catching button design
Supports click state tracking via React useState hook
ai_summary: A 3D-styled button component featuring decorative SVG stroke elements that create splash-like visual accents. The button includes a bg div for depth effects and uses React useState for potential click tracking. Designed as an atomic interactive element that can serve as a primary CTA or decorative button in various UI contexts.
